Bash(docker exec selfin-backend sh -c "cd /tmp && cp /app/app.jar . && unzip -q app.jar ''BOOT-INF/lib/spring-boot-autoconfigure-4.0.3.jar'' && cd BOOT-INF/lib && unzip -l spring-boot-autoconfigure-4.0.3.jar | grep -i flyway")

Bash(docker exec selfin-backend sh -c "ls /tmp && cd /tmp && unzip -q /app/app.jar ''BOOT-INF/lib/spring-boot-autoconfigure-4.0.3.jar'' -d extracted && ls extracted/BOOT-INF/lib/ && unzip -l extracted/BOOT-INF/lib/spring-boot-autoconfigure-4.0.3.jar | grep -i flyway")

Bash(docker exec selfin-backend sh -c "jar tf /tmp/extracted/BOOT-INF/lib/spring-boot-autoconfigure-4.0.3.jar | grep -i flyway")
Bash(xargs -I{} sh -c 'result=$\(unzip -l ""{}"" 2>/dev/null | grep -i flyway\); if [ -n ""$result"" ]; then echo ""FILE: {}""; echo ""$result""; fi')
